Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = require\('path'\); const dir = 'C:/Users/Lee/AppData/Local/Temp'; const files = fs.readdirSync\(dir\).filter\(f => f.endsWith\('.png'\) || f.endsWith\('.jpg'\)\).map\(f => \({name: f, mtime: fs.statSync\(path.join\(dir, f\)\).mtime}\)\).sort\(\(a,b\) => b.mtime - a.mtime\).slice\(0, 15\); files.forEach\(f => console.log\(f.mtime.toISOString\(\), f.name\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = require\('path'\); const dir = 'C:/Users/Lee/AppData/Local/Temp'; const files = fs.readdirSync\(dir\).filter\(f => f.startsWith\('codex-clipboard'\) || f.endsWith\('one.png'\)\).map\(f => \({name: f, mtime: fs.statSync\(path.join\(dir, f\)\).mtime}\)\).sort\(\(a,b\) => b.mtime - a.mtime\).slice\(0, 5\); files.forEach\(f => console.log\(f.mtime.toISOString\(\), f.name\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = require\('path'\); const dir = 'C:/Users/Lee/AppData/Local/Temp'; const files = fs.readdirSync\(dir\).filter\(f => /\\.\(png|jpg|jpeg\)$/i.test\(f\)\).map\(f => \({name: f, size: fs.statSync\(path.join\(dir, f\)\).size, mtime: fs.statSync\(path.join\(dir, f\)\).mtime}\)\).sort\(\(a,b\) => b.mtime - a.mtime\).slice\(0, 15\); files.forEach\(f => console.log\(f.mtime.toISOString\(\), f.size, f.name\)\)")
